message: The committed memory-backup pointer (.engine/memory-backup/pointer.json) records WHERE this project's saved memory is backed up. In a real project that location is yours to commit, but this public engine-template repository must always ship the unconfigured placeholder, so a maintainer's private vault location can never travel to everyone who uses the template. This rule fails if a CONFIGURED pointer (one carrying real owner/repo/namespace coordinates) is committed here; it only ever applies while this is the construction repository and reads the committed file, not your local working copy, so a vault you keep configured locally never trips it. To fix it, restore the placeholder ({"schema_version": 1, "configured": false}) and keep your real pointer local.
